description: Peep-toe slingback styling on kitten heels, perfect for the right corporate impression, yet stylish enough for an evening drink. Style this with formal, semi-formal or ethnic ensembles.Heel: 2"UpperSynthetic leather and fabric upper in a peep-toe design for durability and styleElasticated slingback for a snug FitTextile lined upper to avoid shoe bitesSynthetic leather covered footbed in ergonomic design for absolute comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heels for lightweight comfort and styleTextured heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
